{{CargoOrgan
|name=Mutant Beast Eye
|type=Bionic
|rank=blue
|id=10653
|idx=10
|description=An alien pupil, gold and slit-crossed, radiating I-will-end-you vibes.
|skill=Unleash beast aura, dealing DMG equal to 143.2% of ATK, and increase next round's CRIT by 11%!
|hp=630
|def=161
|atk=95
|rush=98
|gene1=During exploration, Earth DMG +60
|gene2=In explorations, {race} DEF +20
|gene3=During exploration, CRIT DMG REDUC +5%
|gene7=Earth DMG +90 (Awakened)
|}}
